LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY GANG INJUNCTION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. EXCEPT, THE REVISED ORDER SHALL BE MODIFIED AS TO #2 GUNS OR DANGEROUS WEAPONS TO PROHIBIT THE ACTIVITY "ANYWHERE IN PUBLIC VIEW OR ANY PLACE ACCESSIBLE TO THE PUBLIC..." THE REMAINDER OF THE PROPOSED REVISED ORDER IS APPROVED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY GANG INJUNCTION.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED.
